title: HyperDirector Brand Kit
description: Persistent brand configuration applied to all generated videos. Place brand-kit.json in your project root.

brand_name.description: Brand or creator name. Used in CTA and attribution text.

locale.description: Brand locale. Sets default language behavior for generated content.

default_output_language.description: Default language for generated video scripts, captions, and on-screen copy. Can be overridden per brief.

language_policy.description: Fine-grained language control for each content layer.

subtitle_language.description: Language for on-screen subtitles and captions.

ui_copy_language.description: Language for CTA buttons and UI overlay text.

technical_terms.description: How to handle technical terms (API, GSAP, HTML, etc.) in Chinese-language videos.

colors.description: Brand color palette. Values are applied as CSS variables in generated compositions.

primary.description: Primary brand color. Used for headlines and key text.

accent.description: Accent color. Used for highlights, buttons, and emphasis.

fonts.description: Brand font stack. Font names must be available in the render environment.

headline.description: Font for large display text and scene titles. Example: Inter, Space Grotesk.

body.description: Font for captions and body copy. Use CJK-compatible font for Chinese: Noto Sans SC, PingFang SC.

code.description: Monospace font for code snippets in technical videos. Example: JetBrains Mono.

motion_language.description: Animation style preferences. Maps to GSAP ease and timing choices in the composer.

pace.description: Overall animation pace. fast=0.2s, medium=0.4s, slow=0.6s per element entrance.

style.description: Visual character. Influences easing choices, transition types, and typographic weight.

transitions.description: Preferred transition types. Composer selects from this list.

entrance_default.description: Default entrance animation for text elements. Example: fade_slide_up.

exit_default.description: Default exit animation for scene endings. Example: fade_out.

tone.description: Positive description of desired copy voice. Example: professional, direct, high information density.

avoid.description: Copy patterns to avoid. Example: excessive hype, vague slogans, cheap icons.

tts_voice.description: Kokoro TTS voice identifier. See HyperFrames prompting guide for available voices.

cta.description: Call-to-action copy variants. Composer selects based on brief.cta_override or defaults to cta.default.

default.description: Default CTA text used when no override is specified.

assets.description: Default asset paths relative to project root.

safe_zone.description: Subtitle and content safe zone as percentage of canvas dimensions.
